fact: The first official Test match was played in 1877 between Australia and England.
India won the 1983 Cricket World Cup under Kapil Dev.
The first FIFA World Cup was held in 1930 in Uruguay.
Lionel Messi captained Argentina to the 2022 FIFA World Cup title.
P. V. Sindhu won the BWF World Championships in 2019.
The Thomas Cup is the men's world team badminton championship.
